briefing.title: Quote-decision briefing · auto-drafted, editable

paragraphs.html: This week: 4 escalations awaiting decision (€33K combined deal value · €3,050 margin leakage if rubber-stamped). 33 green quotes auto-approved. 9 amber pending justification.
Concentration signal: all 4 escalations sit with 3 reps (N. Bauer × 2, F. Werner, T. Hoffmann). N. Bauer accounts for 41% of total breach leakage YTD — coaching review suggested before next quarter.
Guardrail activity: Precision-shafts and Sleeves thresholds raised to 25% / 24% on Apr 14 (was 22%) — €12K margin uplift attributable. Couplings and Bearings stable since Mar 30.
SKU-level signal: Article 200832-E remains the structural problem (22 breaches, discounting actually wins more). 205415-B and 211094-C can be tightened by 1–2pp without hurting win rate.

briefing.signature: — M. Weber, Pricing · drafted by Pryzm · please review before forwarding.

pipeline.sub: 21 days avg from quote to decision

escalations.title: 4 quotes need your eyes
escalations.subtitle: All Red-flagged quotes are blocked from sending until you decide. 60-second decision per quote.
escalations.infoPanelHtml: All Red-flagged quotes are blocked from sending until you decide. Each card carries cross-customer evidence, the forecast-informed price floor, and the exact margin impact — designed for a 60-second decision per quote.
escalations.concentrationHtml: All 4 escalations sit with 3 reps · N. Bauer × 2, F. Werner, T. Hoffmann · N. Bauer accounts for 41% of YTD breach leakage
escalations.bulkRecommendationHtml: Pryzm recommends Counter-at-floor on #12848, Decline #12831, Counter at €2.55 on #12822, Approve #12815 — total leakage avoided €2,710.
escalations.bulkAcceptToast: Pryzm recommendations applied to all 4 escalations · routed to sales

cards.detailHtml: Quoted €4.20/unit · 1,200 units · margin 8% — 17pp below guardrail (25%). Total deal value: €5,040 · margin gap vs guardrail: €1,030 leakage if approved. Rep: N. Bauer · requested 5 days ago, customer pressuring for response.
cards.evidenceHtml: Evidence: Same article sold to Customer 102330 at €6.80 (25% margin) last month, identical volume tier. Forecast-informed floor: €5.10. 539 governance violations on this SKU in Q1 already — pattern continues.
cards.metaLine: Strategic tier · do not lose customer · counter-propose at floor and document Strategic exception

actions.label: Approve at €5.10 (floor)
actions.toast: Approved at floor €5.10 · counter-proposal sent to N. Bauer

cards.detailHtml: Quoted €13.80/unit · 480 units · margin 14% — 8pp below guardrail (22%). Total deal value: €6,624 · margin gap: €530 leakage. Rep: F. Werner · 3 days open. Customer claims competitor offered €13.20.
cards.evidenceHtml: Evidence: Forecast-informed floor: €14.40. Customer 101900 is tier-D (problematic) — already 22% volume drop after last price raise. Peer Customer 103044 paid €15.40 same volume tier. Win-rate at guardrail for this SKU: 71% (we don't usually need to discount).
cards.metaLine: Problematic tier · attrition acceptable · let walk if push back

actions.label: Counter at €14.40
actions.toast: Counter at €14.40 floor sent · F. Werner notified

actions.label: Decline
actions.toast: Declined · customer attrition acceptable per tier policy

cards.detailHtml: Quoted €2.40/unit · 6,800 units · margin 17% — 7pp below guardrail (24%). Total deal value: €16,320 · margin gap: €1,150 leakage. Rep: T. Hoffmann · large volume — annual rebate accrual already at Tier 2.
cards.evidenceHtml: Evidence: If they hit 8,000-unit Tier 3 by Dec, retroactive rebate of €2,400 kicks in — net realized margin would be 13%. Forecast-informed floor: €2.45. Recommend: counter at €2.55 to preserve net margin after rebate.
cards.metaLine: Volume tier discipline · protect against rebate stack · counter at €2.55 net

actions.label: Approve at €2.45
actions.toast: Approved at €2.45 floor · rebate flag activated

cards.detailHtml: Quoted €4.50/unit · 1,200 units · margin 17% — 5pp below guardrail (22%). Total deal value: €5,400 · margin gap: €340 leakage. Rep: N. Bauer · seasonal customer · maintenance cycle pricing.
cards.evidenceHtml: Evidence: Aug peak imminent (web-enriched seasonality flag) — customer historically restocks heavy in Aug. Floor: €4.40. Recommend approve — small leakage justified by upcoming volume.

funnel.title: Where quotes get stuck
funnel.subtitle: Long-aging quotes lose. Velocity from Quoted → Pending → Won/Lost. Stale 30+ day quotes auto-flag for re-quote.
funnel.infoPanelHtml: Long-aging quotes lose. Track velocity from Quoted through Pending review to Won/Lost, and watch the buckets where deals overstay their welcome. Stale 30+ day quotes auto-flag for re-quote.

guardrails.title: Guardrail thresholds
guardrails.subtitle: These thresholds drive Red/Amber/Green on every active quote. Sales sees the result; changes propagate in 2 min.

guardrails.infoPanelHtml: These thresholds drive the Red/Amber/Green signal on every active quote. Sales sees the result, not the inputs. Changes propagate within 2 minutes.

rep.description: Repeat offender = 3+ breaches in 30d AND breach rate > portfolio avg.
rep.infoPanelHtml: Coaching flag = 1–2 breaches with willingness to revise. On-policy = consistently within guardrail. Click Coaching review on any row to open a 1:1 prep memo with rep-specific stats and recommended talking points.
rep.tabFooterText: N. Bauer = 41% of total leakage · pattern worsening · coaching action triggered

rows.actionToast: 1:1 prep memo opened · N. Bauer · pattern, top SKUs, recommended script

sku.description: Where does discount pressure concentrate? Win-rate at-guardrail vs below tells you what to tighten.
sku.infoPanelHtml: Where can we tighten or loosen the guardrail without losing deals? When win-rate below guardrail ≈ win-rate at guardrail, discounting isn't actually winning — tighten. When the gap is large, the floor may need a strategic review.
sku.tabFooterText: 3 guardrail adjustments suggested · 200832-E needs strategic review

actions.label: Recalibrate
actions.toast: Guardrail tightened by 1pp on 205415-B · propagates in 2 min

actions.label: Recalibrate
actions.toast: Guardrail tightened by 2pp on 211094-C · propagates in 2 min

cust.description: Which customers pressure on price the most?
cust.infoPanelHtml: High discount-asked + high tier = strategic exception (negotiate hard but retain). High discount-asked + low tier = walk away. Low discount-asked + healthy win rate = candidate for list-price increase on next renewal.
cust.tabFooterText: 101900 asking 14% discount + 22% volume drop · reprice · 103044 0% asks · raise candidate

rows.recommendation: Watch rebate stack · counter at floor
